title: API Fiddle Workspace
description: A workspace within the API Fiddle platform used to organize and group related API design projects.

description.description: A detailed description of the workspace.

ownerId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the workspace.

members.description: List of members with access to the workspace.

role.description: Role of the member within the workspace.

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the member joined the workspace.

projects.description: List of project identifiers within this workspace.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the workspace was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the workspace was last updated.
